summary: Frontend-only testing of 6 reports (3 standard + 3 aggressive) for R v Homann case (case_1114ec0e2fd0). All reports verified for section structure, sentence auto-extraction, content quality, and Barrister View functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 reports for case_1114ec0e2fd0 verified. Reports use 2-pass generation for extensive_log. Sentence auto-extraction working correctly with cleanSentence() function. AI meta-comment stripping working via cleanAIContent().
